title: psychotria diffusa var. cervina
intro: Psychotria diffusa var. cervina, also known as the wild coffee or Iram, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating gastrointestinal issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. The herbal preparations of Psychotria diffusa var. cervina typically involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
